meta.name: lince-codex-permissive
meta.description: OpenAI Codex, permissive sandbox: OpenAI API + GitHub allowlist (api.github.com, github.com, objects.githubusercontent.com); reads ~/.config/gh, ~/.cache, ~/.ssh/known_hosts so gh CLI works (no docker, no podman, no direct git push). Codex's own --sandbox is disabled (danger-full-access).
